2_primaryJTBD.decision: What messages do I need to read and respond to?

3_decisionVsInfoRatio.assessment: EXCELLENT - Strong decision focus for messaging app
3_decisionVsInfoRatio.dominantDecision: Yes - Send message is clear primary action

4_visualHierarchy.assessment: EXCELLENT - Classic two-panel messaging layout with clear hierarchy

kpis.metric: Unread messages (implicitly shown in conversation list)

5_kpiQuality.assessment: MODERATE - Unread indicator is actionable, but total count is vanity

7_flowAndNavigationCost.assessment: EXCELLENT - Minimal clicks for all messaging actions

8_stateCoverage.assessment: EXCELLENT - Comprehensive state handling with retry
gaps: No success toast after sending message
No success feedback after editing/deleting message

9_roleScalability.recommendation: Well-designed for all users - familiar messaging UX

10_strategicVerdict.diagnosis: Professional messaging interface with solid UX
10_strategicVerdict.currentBehavior: Two-panel messaging with conversation list + message thread
10_strategicVerdict.desiredBehavior: Two-panel messaging with conversation list + message thread

topIssues.issue: No real-time updates - relies on 10-second polling
topIssues.impact: Messages may appear delayed, not truly real-time

topIssues.issue: Ny samtale button shows alert('kommer snart') placeholder
No success feedback after sending/editing/deleting messages

10_strategicVerdict.structuralFix: Implement WebSocket for real-time messaging + complete new conversation flow + add success toasts

11_crossPageConsistency.note: Uses PageHeader pattern. Full-screen messaging layout breaks from standard page patterns (intentional). Integrates with conversation hooks for real data. Polling-based updates (10s interval).

stateHandling.empty: Empty state with 'Velg en samtale' message
stateHandling.error: Error message with retry button for conversations

dataSource.note: Uses hooks: useConversations, useConversation, useSendMessage, useEditMessage, useDeleteMessage, useMarkAsRead

polling.note: Polls for new messages every 10s when conversation selected

overallAssessment: EXCELLENT - Professional messaging interface with real API integration, needs WebSocket for real-time and new conversation creation
